title: Health to Size
description: Your size changes depending on your Health
body:
Uses the generic.scale attribute introduced in 23w51a to scale the player relative to their health.

![Player taking damage and getting smaller](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYnQ0Zm9lYWhpaTB3OG9icWZ1YmNpeGljN2s0a29oaW5lODR6aHd6dCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/O5VMSiv7HRHBQVlhAT/giphy.gif)

- You can run `/trigger sizeMultiplier set [value]` to adjust your Size Multiplier (Default: 10)
- You can run `/scoreboard players [playerName] sizeMultiplier [value]` to adjust any player's Size Multiplier (Default: 10)
- You can run `/tag [playerName] add dontSize` to make that player's size not change


Contact me on Discord for any issues! @hexasan
